content: Energy markets weren't prepared for attacks on GCC countries by Iran, as part of the retaliation against strikes from the US and Israel, says Svelland Capital Director Nadia Martin Wiggen. Discussing the strait of Hormuz, a key shipping lane for energy, she says that key impact will be on LNG, and that stockpiles are currently low as we're coming out of the winter period. She spoke about the latest market moves with Vonnie Quinn on Bloomberg Brief.  Source  Bloomberg

metadata.summary: Energy markets weren't prepared for attacks on GCC countries by Iran, as part of the retaliation against strikes from the US and Israel, says Svelland Capital Director Nadia Martin Wiggen
